steps.title: Recognize the complex list
steps.content: The sentence lists measurement units: the sa, the shesep, and the khar. Each unit is paired with a description, so semicolons should separate the main list items while commas attach descriptions to names clearly.

steps.title: Keep names with descriptions
steps.content: Choice A splits shesep from “a unit of length.” Choice B lacks needed punctuation after “area.” Choice D uses a comma where a semicolon is needed and also splits shesep from its description. The punctuation must separate list items cleanly. The answer is C.
